short.en: The innkeeper wants five rat tails from the cellar.
short.cs: Hostinský chce pět krysích ocásků ze sklepa.

long.en: The pub cellar is overrun with rats and the innkeeper can't get to his cook-pot. Bring him five rat tails and he'll lend you the kitchen key and serve you a hot bowl of soup.
long.cs: Sklep hostince je plný krys a hostinský se nedostane ke svému kotlíku. Přines mu pět krysích ocásků a on ti půjčí klíč od kuchyně a uvaří horkou polévku.

desc.en: Deliver 5 rat tails to the innkeeper.
